data.title: [RED] test_ticket_reducer_llm_format.py: verify to_llm importable from ticket_reducer.llm_format package
data.description: Create tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_llm_format.py. RED tests that will fail before ticket_reducer/llm_format.py is created: (1) test_to_llm_importable_from_package — from ticket_reducer.llm_format import to_llm; assert callable(to_llm); (2) test_to_llm_key_mapping_via_package — same assertions as test_ticket_llm_format.py for key mapping, but importing from package not importlib; (3) test_to_llm_omits_none_via_package — None values omitted; (4) test_to_llm_importable_from_top_level_package — from ticket_reducer import to_llm (tests __init__.py re-export). These tests MUST fail before llm_format.py exists. testing_mode: RED.
